intro: Pseudosophora sericea, also known as Sichuan sophora, is a flowering plant in the pea family (Fabaceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its potential to alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. The bioactive constituents of Pseudosophora sericea include alkaloids, flavonoids, and saponins, which are believed to contribute to its medicinal properties. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations, such as teas and tinctures, to treat respiratory issues, and is also used in the form of dried roots and rhizomes for medicinal purposes.
